message:
🌱 Add opencost: Failed OpenCost integration to GCP  mission (#1414)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opencost-2742-failed-opencost-integration-to-gcp",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opencost: Failed OpenCost integration to GCP ",
+    "description": "Failed OpenCost integration to GCP . Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current opencost deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your opencost version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost\nhelm list -n opencost 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working opencost installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opencost configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opencost configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost\nkubectl get configmap -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opencost\n```\nFollowing step by step the installation guide, Opencost 1.110 fails the integration to GCP."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Failed OpenCost integration to GCP ",
+        "description": "## What does this PR change?\nThis PR adds a memory backed config controller which can be used when there is no PV to back the cloud config controllers state. As is this is the only way the config controller will be run in OpenCost. \nDoing this prevents errors such as\n```yaml\n2024-05-14T07:36:43.43448165Z WRN Controller: pullWatchers: failed to load config statuses from file: open /var/configs/cloud-configurations.json: no such file or directory. Proceeding to create the file\n2024-05-14T07:36:43.43465676Z ERR Controller: pullWatchers: failed to save statuses failed to save config statuses to file: open /var/configs/cloud-configurations.json: no such file or directory\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost\nkubectl get events -n opencost --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Failed OpenCost integration to GCP \" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## What does this PR change?\nThis PR adds a memory backed config controller which can be used when there is no PV to back the cloud config controllers state. As is this is the only way the config controller will be run in OpenCost.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "2024-05-14T07:36:43.43448165Z WRN Controller: pullWatchers: failed to load config statuses from file: open /var/configs/cloud-configurations.json: no such file or directory. Proceeding to create the file\n2024-05-14T07:36:43.43465676Z ERR Controller: pullWatchers: failed to save statuses failed to save config statuses to file: open /var/configs/cloud-configurations.json: no such file or directory",
+        "2024-06-07T19:33:57.065968538Z ERR Controller: pullWatchers: failed to save statuses failed to save config statuses to file: open /var/configs/cloud-configurations.json: permission denied"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "opencost",
+      "incubating",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "opencost"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/opencost/opencost/issues/2742",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/opencost/opencost",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/opencost/opencost/pull/2785"
+    },
+    "reactions": 2,
+    "comments": 14,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with opencost installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-18T06:36:18.139Z",
